author: Christopher Lee McClendon
name: 11L GEPA + 12k Steps + Pure Int6 + 15-Percentile GPTQ-lite + Legal TTT
blurb: GEPA architecture trained for 12000 steps (7000 peak-LR + 5000 warmdown) with pure int6 per-row quantization using 15-candidate GPTQ-lite clip search and zstd-22 compression. Legal score-first TTT (SGD, 10 epochs, momentum 0.9) drives final BPP to 1.1079.
